visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco warehouse setting with a prominent Costco logo overlay. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse and black vest, stands next to a wooden Cornhole board branded with 'EastPoint'. She holds a small pink bean bag and prepares to toss it. The lighting is bright and industrial, characteristic of a large retail store. (2) The woman tosses the bean bag onto the wooden board; the camera pans to follow the movement as the bag slides toward the hole. In the background, aisles of merchandise and other shoppers are visible, including a person pushing a cart. (3) The woman looks directly at the camera with a surprised and excited expression, her mouth open and eyes wide. She gestures toward the game board as text overlays and colorful variety graphics appear around her. (4) The camera switches to a medium shot showing the woman talking and gesturing with her hands while standing near the product display. She touches her face and smiles frequently. (5) A close-up shot focuses on the price tag ($2,799) and the woman's interaction with the game, followed by a wide shot of her standing in the aisle talking to the person filming. (6) The video concludes with the woman pointing and smiling at the camera as a large 'of course' graphic appears, while background shoppers continue to move through the brightly lit warehouse space.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 投擲遊戲. [Subtitle]: 是用滑的還是. (2) [Slogan]: 2,790. [Subtitle]: 應該是滑過去吧. (3) [Subtitle]: 滑過去對. (4) [Variety]: 哇 你好強哦. [Variety]: 投擲遊戲神人. (5) [Subtitle]: 你是投擲遊戲神人耶. [Subtitle]: 有時候迪士尼他們都會有這種投擲遊戲. (6) [Variety]: 哇 哇. [Subtitle]: 哇 你是神人哎. [Subtitle]: 天吶 還是不能站那麼近. (7) [Subtitle]: 其實我已經貼在板子上了. (8) [Slogan]: 2,799元. [Subtitle]: 或者你在這邊無限試玩. (9) [Subtitle]: 我跟你說成人要怎麼玩. [Subtitle]: 成人就是上面可以放一些酒瓶. (10) [Subtitle]: 就可以更有趣. (11) [Subtitle]: 2,800我可以喝三瓶酒哎. [Subtitle]: 所以你寧願選酒也不要買這投資遊戲啊. (12) [Variety]: of course.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female shopper in background, 1 male shopper pushing cart, 1 child in a cart.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a black sleeveless vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large-scale warehouse store (Costco) with high ceilings, industrial lighting, and large shelves filled with boxed merchandise, including plush toys and outdoor games.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and bouncy synthesized BGM begins immediately. A female voice speaks in a bright, energetic tone, asking about the game rules. (2) A sharp 'thud' and sliding sound occur as a bean bag hits the wood. The background music remains constant. (3) A cartoonish 'pop' SFX sounds as the bean bag reaches its destination. The main speaker laughs, and her voice pitch rises with excitement. (4) Frequent 'ding' and UI-style SFX punctuate the dialogue, aligning with variety text appearances. (5) The conversation continues between the woman on screen and a female voice behind the camera, both maintaining a high-energy, humorous tone. (6) Ambient hum of a retail warehouse is faintly audible beneath the music and voices. (7) A final celebratory 'ding' SFX marks the end of the segment.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a fun product found at Costco in a lighthearted, vlog-style manner, sharing a humorous take on how the product could be repurposed for adult entertainment (drinking games).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of Costco logo and the EastPoint brand product, along with price information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social-media style shopping vlog characterized by high-density text overlays, energetic BGM, and variety-show editing techniques.
